Nice small exhibit. Very friendly lady at the entrance. It is not worth a detour, but if you are curious and nearby, why not. It is free! The level of explanation is either too light or too heavy; the exhibit doesn’t feel very cohesive.

I visited last Spring. The workers couldn't really answer basic questions...seemed to know less about eyesight than the visitors. One worker, a tall guy with a brown beard, talked so much but didn't seem to know much about eyesight or history. Prob not his fault, he looked like a college kid and probably just nobody train him.
